properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v3 v6 v3 v3 v7 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Free, I long to be free I long for the day I believe That all you say you see in me is true That's hard for me to do It's hard for me to die to myself And trust my life to someone else

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So come, empty me out I'm no good without You inside of me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come and fill my heart with hope Come and fill my life with love Come and fill my soul with strength to carry on Because from here the climb is steep, the road is long Come and fill my days with dreams (Come and help me to believe) Empty me of all the empty things that I hold on to Come and fill my heart with you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need you in my life Need you like the air that I breathe You become the very heart of me And I, I can't believe my eyes I can't believe the dream that I've found Lord your love has turned my world around

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So come, fill up my heart till I am like you are So deep inside of me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Search me Lord, try my heart Come and take me now and make me new So Lord that the world will see you in my life

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Come and fill my days with dreams Empty me of all the empty things that I hold on to, Come and fill my heart with you
